name: Cake Mix Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package Cake mix (flavor of your choice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well until evenly distributed.
3. Drop rounded teaspoons of the mixture onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Bake for 9 - 12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
5. Remove from oven and let cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
6. Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
